text:
RT @NaomiSeibt: I created a website for the Rape Gang Inquiry testimonies with Grok.

You can now read and share the quotes from survivors:…

RT @AutismCapital: The United Kingdom is going to announce additional restrictions in July on VPN usage. This is ON TOP OF the social media…

G7 AI 领域午餐会，头部的几家 AI公司负责人都在了。

当然焦点还是 Anthropic 的 Dario，哥们看着老尴尬了 https://t.co/zf31xyv2Sz

We already knew the Chinese companies relentlessly copy the US models...

But now they are creating IDENTICAL apps that run those models. 

This is an exact replica of Codex.

I turned my anti-AI-slop banlist into a 60-second arcade game. 

Catch the words humans actually write. 
Avoid the words AI keeps overusing. 

3 lives, and it gets faster until you get slopped out.  I scored 384. 
I really don't think you can beat it: https://t.co/LqwUjifBDp

The part I am a little proud of:  every word falling at you is pulled straight from the actual banlist I use to scrub AI out of my own copy.  

So while you panic-catch words, your eye quietly learns what AI slop looks like. 
You walk away better at spotting it, for free.

It is free. No signup. 
Plays on your phone.  

Fair warning: you will get slopped out. Everyone does.  

https://t.co/elYOmebUkl
